verifier_scope: Review whether the MCP server install scenario includes required capability, trust, policy, approval, oversight, and audit evidence artifacts.
continuity_assumptions: The same mcp_server_id appears across capability, trust, request, approval, and governance artifacts.
The same policy fingerprint appears across trust, approval, governance, boundary, and audit artifacts.
The approved scope remains limited to the declared approved project workspace.

verification_outcomes.PASS: Required install review artifacts are present and internally consistent for MVP governance review.
verification_outcomes.FAIL: Required install review artifacts are missing, policy fingerprints are inconsistent, review evidence is absent, or the approved scope is not declared.
verification_outcomes.UNSUPPORTED: The requested verification requires live runtime enforcement proof, cryptographic package provenance, or external attestation outside the MVP scope.
